correction.reason: The previously rendered page showed stale mutable upstream state and an external recommendation after the pull request had received a CHANGES_REQUESTED review and closed without merge.
superseded_claims: The receipt could be presented as an external recommendation to merge.

correction_text:
Correction — July 23, 2026
PR #901 was closed unmerged after a maintainer objected to Northset’s use of the project and its review process in a product demonstration. M-012 remains only an immutable record of the original `a0bdd2d…` patch and the single listed command. Earlier rendered status showing the PR as open, and language describing upstream CI as agreeing with M-012, were inaccurate and have been withdrawn. The later PR head was not executed by M-012.

immutable_scope.scope_note: The declared network-off check runs only the configuration unit test (src/utils/configuration/__tests__/index.test.mjs) on node:22 after a disclosed online npm ci. It does not run the full test suite, eslint, prettier, or the TypeScript/JSDoc type-check gates that upstream CI also runs.
